content.name: Pokey's Shield Mod Rebalance
content.description: Turns shield mods into clear archetypes: Bastion (capacity), Regenerator (recharge rate) and Resilient (recharge delay), with capacity as the always-good stat that scales up each tier. No roll RNG. Numbers only, no new wares, savegame-safe.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Shield Mod Rebalance
text.description: Shield mods as clear archetypes: Bastion (capacity), Regenerator (rate), Resilient (delay); capacity scales each tier. No roll RNG. Numbers only, savegame-safe.
text.author: Pokey
